title: A Hidden Plan Advances
description: On pages 17–19, this part focuses on a hidden plan advances, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Hidden Plan Advances. The trapped crew survives Crocodile’s death trap and scrambles to continue the mission before the war reaches Alubarna. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh crap! Nothing's gonna work against this monster!

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Yes, I can hear you just fine. You must be one of the millions.

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: I've never used a Mini Dender- mushi before... Hello?

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Oh, nothing wrong! I can talk just fine.

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: You on the dender- mushi! Spit it out quickly!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Black [Bintlen Mushi They do not grow as they age. They enjoy eavesdropping, but dislike communicating with others.Commonly used as listening devices, or "wiretops".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Denden Mushi Too big to carry around, but its strength makes it useful for talking to far-off islands. Can also act as a fax machine if the accessory is attached.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Baby Denden Mushi its small size makes it portable. However, its signals are weak, and cannot reach over the sea to another island.

summary: This part develops a hidden plan advances and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
